subcodes.title: Words to the Baha'is, spoken on 1912-10-20
subcodes.first_line: Very welcome! Are you all well? You must be very happy, very happy, very grateful, for it was very difficult for me to come and reach this part.... One act soul is preferable to a thousand inactive and useless souls
